title: epidendrum sanctae-martae
intro: Epidendrum sanctae-martae, also known as the Santa Marta orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta mountains in Colombia. The medicinal properties of Epidendrum sanctae-martae include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, Epidendrum sanctae-martae is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that are used to treat various ailments, and its extracts have also been used in modern medicine to develop new treatments.
